text.title: Small Team Comms Rhythm Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: declare config → run daily pulse → weekly sync → monthly direction → graduation watch.

step.name: declare-config
step.action: Run `pulse-compose` to declare the three rituals + duration caps. Publish to team channel.
step.decision-gate: If team_size >= 4, refuse to declare; trigger graduation conversation.

step.name: daily-pulse
step.action: Every team member (including founder) posts 3-line async pulse (did / next / blocked) by EOD.

step.name: weekly-sync
step.input: Pulse threads from week + agenda posted >= 24h ahead
step.action: Run `sync-agenda-curate`. ≤ 30-min wall-clock. Cancel if no agenda 24h ahead.
step.decision-gate: If agenda not published 24h ahead, postpone; do NOT run agenda-less sync.

step.name: monthly-direction
step.action: Run `direction-synthesise`. ≤ 45 min. Confirm 3 rituals still the right shape; check graduation trigger.

step.name: graduation-watch
step.input: Current team_size + ritual count + cadence drift signals
step.action: If team_size approaching 4 OR ritual count crept above 3, schedule graduation conversation in next monthly check.
